query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dataset_registry (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('GS1_STANDARDS', 'GDSN_DATA', 'ESRS_DATAPOINTS', 'CBV_VOCABULARIES', 'DPP_RULES', 'EU_REGULATIONS', 'INDUSTRY_DATASETS', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  format ENUM('JSON', 'CSV', 'XML', 'XLSX', 'PDF', 'API', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(64),
  recordCount INT,
  fileSize INT,
  downloadUrl VARCHAR(512),
  apiEndpoint VARCHAR(512),
  lastVerifiedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  verificationNotes TEXT,
  isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  metadata JSON,
  tags JSON,
  relatedRegulationIds JSON,
  relatedStandardIds JSON,
  governanceNotes TEXT,
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX lastVerified_idx (lastVerifiedDate),
  INDEX isActive_idx (isActive)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 31QbGTVHxF7ThTp.root --database cozU6EotfgGjqPV9552owj --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dataset_registry (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category ENUM('GS1_STANDARDS', 'GDSN_DATA', 'ESRS_DATAPOINTS', 'CBV_VOCABULARIES', 'DPP_RULES', 'EU_REGULATIONS', 'INDUSTRY_DATASETS', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL,
  format ENUM('JSON', 'CSV', 'XML', 'XLSX', 'PDF', 'API', 'OTHER') NOT NULL,
  version VARCHAR(64),
  recordCount INT,
  fileSize INT,
  downloadUrl VARCHAR(512),
  apiEndpoint VARCHAR(512),
  lastVerifiedDate TIMESTAMP NULL,
  verifiedBy VARCHAR(255),
  verificationNotes TEXT,
  isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  metadata JSON,
  tags JSON,
  relatedRegulationIds JSON,
  relatedStandardIds JSON,
  governanceNotes TEXT,
  laneStatus ENUM('LANE_A', 'LANE_B', 'LANE_C') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LANE_C',
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX category_idx (category),
  INDEX lastVerified_idx (lastVerifiedDate),
  INDEX isActive_idx (isActive)
)
